## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] i18n keys added in EN, PT-BR, ES
- [ ] Prisma migration has a `ROLLBACK.md` note
- [ ] No hardcoded English user-facing strings
- [ ] Edition declared: `community` or `enterprise` (in issue)
- [ ] Security-sensitive change: threat model updated if applicable
